The '''''Behemoth''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] commanded by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Bethrogg]] before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. At some point during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the ''Behemoth'', under Bethrogg's command, was commissioned to hunt down the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Pegasus Strike Force]].<ref name="TP" /> Shortly after, it joined the [[Lumiya's fleet|fleet]] of [[Lumiya]].<ref name="Lumiya" />

{{Ship-stub}}
